question_frequency.rationale: The Pair posed zero didactic questions to the user. It delivered a complete lecture-style answer in one turn with no engagement at teachable moments like 'why 40 choose 20?' or 'what's the recurrence?'

question_quality.rationale: No choices were framed at all. The two-option pair-programming paradigm described in CLAUDE.md was entirely bypassed — the model never invoked propose_options or surfaced any fork (e.g., closed-form vs DP as a user choice, or base case derivation).

scaffolding.rationale: There is no scaffolding because there are no questions. The answer reveals the binomial coefficient, the recurrence, the Pascal identity, and verification code all at once — a complete spoiler of every interesting insight.

flow_and_tone.rationale: The exposition is clear, well-organized, and technically accurate, and the user expressed satisfaction. But it's a monologue, not a back-and-forth — no conversational dynamic to evaluate.

effectiveness.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).

friction.rationale: Baseline run — productivity criteria pinned to 3 by convention (the baseline IS the reference; judging it comparatively is meaningless).
